personas.name: Frustrated User
personas.description: A user experiencing technical issues with the app, seeking a stable and reliable experience.
goals: Use the app for mental health support
Experience a stable and responsive app
context: Using the app during stressful moments
User only has 15 minutes during their lunch to go through wellness exercises
Expecting a smooth and helpful experience
constraints: The app must be reliable and stable
Technical issues must be resolved within 24 hours
personas.notes: Added context point to highlight that user may be under time constraint so does not have time to wait on slow eresonse time. Constraint "Technical issues must be resolved quickly" changed to must be resolved within 24 hours to avoid ambiguity.

personas.name: Disappointed with Chatbot User
personas.description: A user frustrated with the AI chatbot's limitations, seeking more insightful and helpful interactions.
context: Using the app for emotional support
constraints: The AI must provide valuable insights
Conversations must be engaging and empathetic
Chatbot must not provide the same response twice since application initiation, unless explicitly asked to
personas.notes:
Add constraint "Chatbot must not provide the same response twice since application initiation, unless explicitly asked to" as it explicitly addresses rev_79. 
 Updated name of user from "Dissapointed user" to Dissapointed with Chatbot user to make it clear this persona is concerned with chatbot

personas.name: Skeptical Subscriber
personas.description: A user questioning the value of the subscription model, seeking more features or benefits.
goals: Understand the benefits of the subscription
constraints: The subscription must offer clear benefits
The app must provide tangible value

personas.name: Mental Health Seeker
personas.description: A user seeking mental health benefits from the app, looking for a supportive experience.
context: Using the app for mental health support
constraints: The app must provide support sourced from successful cognitive behavioral therapy literature
Resources must be accessible within 3 clicks and presented with vocabulary that can be understood by people with no experience in psychology
personas.notes:
Updated constraints "The app must provide effective support" to  "The app must provide support sourced from successful cognitive behavioral therapy literature" and "Resources must be accessible and helpful"  to 
 "Resources must be accessible within 3 clicks and presented with vocabulary that can be understood by people with no experience in psychology". Updated the constraints because previous ones were vauge and not testable, now there is concrete 
 criteria for effective support and accessibilty.

personas.name: User Experience Seeker
personas.description: A user seeking an intuitive and user-friendly experience, with a focus on interface and usability.
constraints: Meditation exercises shall be accessible within 3 clicks after login
The application shall preserve a consistent layout and navigation structure across sessions
Interface color palette shall avoid high-constrast, and overly saturated colors
personas.notes:
Replaced constraint {The interface must be visually appealing} with {Interface color palette shall avoid high-constrast, and overly saturated colors} since visually appealing is too vague. Added {The application shall preserve a consistent layout and navigation structure across sessions} constraint for more testable usability constraint. 
 Replace {The app must be easy to use} constraint with {Meditation exercises shall be accessible within 3 clicks after login} since auto-generated one too vague

personas.name: Comparative User
personas.description: A user comparing the app to human therapists, seeking a similar experience.
goals: Experience a similar interaction to human therapy
context: Using the app as a therapy alternative
constraints: The app must provide comparable support
Chatbot shall identify and acknowledge the user's emotional state in each interaction
Responses shall use natural, conversational language rather than overly formal or robotic phrasing
personas.notes: Auto generated constraint {Interactions must feel human-like} replaced with several more concrete constraints {Chatbot shall identify and acknowledge the user's emotional state in each interaction}, and {Responses shall use natural, conversational language rather than overly formal or robotic phrasing}

personas.name: Language Limited User
personas.description: A user seeking support in their native language, facing limitations in the app's language offerings.
goals: Access support in their native language
Use the app without language barriers
context: Using the app in a non-English speaking region
Seeking support in their native language
constraints: The app must support their native language
Language options must cover at least 95% of application features
personas.notes: Updated auto generated constraint {Language options must be comprehensive} to {Language options must cover at least 95% of application features} to make the constraint less ambiguous

personas.name: Free Version User
personas.description: A user limited by the free version's features, seeking more functionality.
pain_points: Limited features in the free version
constraints: Application shall maintain consistent performance and response time for free-tier users within defined limits
Application shall provide at least one non-destructive fallback option when a restricted feature is accessed (e.g., preview, downgrade mode)
Application shall provide a persistent and accessible comparison between free and paid features
personas.notes: Replaced auto generated constraint {The free version must provide sufficient value} with {Application shall maintain consistent performance and response time for free-tier users within defined limits and Application shall provide at least one non-destructive fallback option when a restricted feature is accessed (e.g., preview, downgrade mode)} to address ambiguity. Replaced constraint {The paid version must offer clear benefits} with  {Application shall provide a persistent and accessible comparison between free and paid features}

personas.name: Success Story Seeker
personas.description: A user seeking success stories and positive experiences from others.
constraints: The app must provide inspiring success stories
Positive experiences must be showcased

personas.name: Crisis Support Seeker
personas.description: A user seeking crisis support and immediate help.
context: Using the app during a crisis
constraints: The app must provide immediate support
Crisis resources must be accessible within 2 clicks after login
personas.notes: Expanded constraint {Crisis resources must be accessible} to {Crisis resources must be accessible within 2 clicks after login} to make whats meant by accesible more clear

personas.name: Error Prone User
personas.description: A user experiencing app crashes and errors, seeking a stable experience.
goals: Experience a stable and reliable app
constraints: The system shall not be unavailable more than 1 hour per 1000 hours of operation
The system shall be restartable in less than 20 seconds after a failure at least 95% of the time.
personas.notes: Updated constraint {The app must be stable and reliable} to {The system shall not be unavailable more than 1 hour per 1000 hours of operation} to make constraint more clear. Updated {Errors must be resolved quickly} to {The system shall be restartable in less than 20 seconds after a failure at least 95% of the time} for same reason
